caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a gold chain, and a dark blue baseball cap with a logo sits in a podcast studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a white wall featuring a yellow logo that says "GRIND HUSTLE" accompanied by stars. To his right is a dark background with large red text that reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo for the "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and the text "CHECK IT!". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly. He looks toward someone off-camera to the left, his expression shifting as he talks. His mouth opens and closes while he maintains a consistent posture throughout the clip.
